features.title: Features that make you
features.subtitle: Everything you need to get financially independent, in one fun app.

track.title: Log money in 3 seconds
track.desc: Tap, type, done. No fuss, no boredom.

budget.title: Budget that actually works
budget.desc: Set limits per category, auto-warn before you overspend.

insight.title: AI-style insights
insight.desc: "Your coffee this month is $30 — that's basically a concert ticket 😱"

streak.title: Streaks & badges
streak.desc: The more you log, the more badges. FOMO-worthy!

notif.title: Smart notifications
notif.desc: Bill reminders, savings nudges, never forget.

secure.title: Safe & private
secure.desc: Encrypted data. Only you see your money.

kania.name: Kania, 22
kania.text: Finally know why my monthly money runs out before month end 😭 now I can save for concerts!

raka.name: Raka, 24
raka.text: The UI is so aesthetic, doesn't feel like budgeting. Like a game but my money actually grows.

sasha.name: Sasha, 20
sasha.text: The insights are savage. Showed how much I spend on live shopping. Toxic but useful 💀
